titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 109
GA 109
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Deletion of o at 18.8 by David Parker.
[1-2] changed to εγω at * 7.7 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 6.46 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 17.20 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 8.14 by Rachel Kevern.
Ill tags removed from unclear word at 19.9 and ο[5-6]ωθη changed to [εσταυρ]ωθη at 19.41 by Rachel Kevern.
μη προσποιουμενος moved from 8.7 to 8.6 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break change in 17.25 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break change in 11.54 by Rachel Kevern.
All tags for text wrongly tagged as supplied from Ff 204v-207r, Folio 206v wrongly numbered as 106v corrected by David Parker.
Mistake in supplied text tagging removed by David Parker.
Unnecessary supp tag removed from 15.20 by David Parker.
επουνια tagged as nomen sacrum at 3.12, word break changed at 3.13 by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Catherine Smith.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-A Number: 109Name of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: F181vBase text used: TRns Transcribed by: Frouke SchrijverTranscription begun: 13 December 2012Transcription finished: 14 March 2013 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (> or >> in the margin next to certain text, indicating that text is a quotation from the Old Testament) - No Are there any special symbols in the margin next to any of the following verses: 5.4 No 7.53 - 8.11 No Other remarks:
